subcodes.title: Ziyarat for the last [to believe]
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, beside Whom there is no other god, the All-Subduing, the Most Compelling. And verily, all glory from God be upon His Light, the Most Luminous, the Most Radiant. And thereafter, shouldst thou attain unto that which God hath ordained for thee of the knowledge of that Most Great Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. الحمد لله الذی لا اله الا هو الاقهر الاقهر و انما البهاء من الله علی نوره الانور الانور و بعد اذا ادرکت ما قد قدرالله لک من عرفان ذلک الاسم الاعظم
subcodes.subjects: @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @visitation Tablets
